description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, futuristic design with a predominantly white and lavender color scheme accented by green and blue highlights. Its head is large and helmet-like, with pointed, ear-like extensions on either side and a single visible eye, giving it a stylized, anime-inspired appearance. The torso is narrow with a chest plate that has a green, gem-like centerpiece, and the shoulders are capped with angular armor. The arms and legs are elongated and segmented, with the forearms and lower legs encased in thick, protective coverings. The hands are humanoid with articulated fingers, and the feet are broad and flat, providing stability. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet durable construction, suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, white and lavender humanoid robot with a large helmeted head, pointed ear-like extensions, and armored limbs, accented by green and blue highlights.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's face, chest plate with green centerpiece, and symmetrical armored limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the pointed head extension, slim torso, and thick lower limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the helmet, shoulder armor, and the segmented structure of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the head extension and the profile of the arm and leg armor.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight, and head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No separate clothing; the robot is covered in integrated, armor-like panels with decorative colored accents.
attribute_facial_features: Face features a single visible eye, no discernible mouth or nose, and a smooth helmet-like head with large, pointed side extensions.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible segmentations suggesting hinge or rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles; limbs appear rigid but articulated.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: One visible eye-like sensor on the face; no other sensors visible.
